warnings.backendSearchFailed: Duplicate check could not reach the target backend.
warnings.dedupeUnsupported: The current managed site cannot reliably check duplicates by Base URL.
warnings.exactVerificationUnavailable: An existing channel may match, but exact key verification is unavailable.

description: This page displays API key information for all accounts, including usage and expiration time. You can create new keys for specific accounts by clicking the 'Add Key' button in the upper right corner or the '+' button next to each key item. Please keep your API keys safe and avoid leaking them to others

dialog.createFailed: Failed to create key, please try again later
dialog.createNotSupported: This account does not support creating API keys.
dialog.editModeNoChange: Cannot change account in edit mode
dialog.groupRestrictedNote: Only groups compatible with this model are selectable.
dialog.ipExample: Example: 192.168.1.1,10.0.0.1 or use * for no limit
dialog.ipPlaceholder: Leave empty for no limit, separate multiple IPs with commas
dialog.loadDataFailed: Failed to load data, please try again later
dialog.subnetPlaceholder: Leave empty for no limit, or enter a subnet or CIDR
dialog.updateFailed: Failed to update key, please try again later
dialog.updateNotSupported: This account does not support updating API keys.
dialog.validExpiration: Expiration time must be greater than current time
dialog.validIp: Please enter valid IP addresses, separate multiple IPs with commas
dialog.warningText: Please keep API keys safe and avoid leaking

loadError.description:
The extension could not load keys for this account. The session may have expired, permissions may be insufficient, or the site may be temporarily unavailable. Sign in to the site again, then retry.

Error: {{error}}
loadError.title: Failed to load keys

descriptions.backendSearchFailed: Managed-site checks could not be completed.
descriptions.baseUrlSearchUnsupported: This feature is not supported on the current managed site because it does not support base URL search for channel lookup.
descriptions.configMissingOptional: Optional managed-site channel checks are not enabled yet. Viewing, copying, and creating keys still work.
descriptions.inputPreparationFailed: Verification could not prepare comparable channel inputs.
descriptions.newApiRetrieveKeyHint: For New API, full key comparison depends on the channel key, and viewing that channel key itself requires 2FA verification, so full key comparison is currently unavailable.

managedSiteStatus.pageUnsupported: Managed-site channel checks are unavailable on this page because the current managed site does not currently support searching channels by URL.

recovery.configureLogin: Add the New API login and 2FA-assist fields in Settings first. Until then, the channel key cannot be read and full key comparison cannot be completed.
recovery.verificationRequired: Full key comparison first needs a short-lived New API verification step, because viewing a New API channel key itself requires 2FA.

key.tooltipMatched: A channel under the same normalized URL bucket matched this key: {{channelName}}.
key.tooltipNoMatch: Comparable channel keys were available, but none matched this key.
key.tooltipNotProvided: No comparable key was available for this token.
key.tooltipUnavailable: Key comparison could not be completed because comparable channel keys were unavailable.

models.tooltipContained: The normalized model set matched channel {{channelName}} by containment.
models.tooltipExact: The normalized model set exactly matched channel {{channelName}}.
models.tooltipNoMatch: No model match was confirmed inside the normalized URL bucket.
models.tooltipNotProvided: No comparable model list was available for this token.
models.tooltipSimilar: The normalized model set matched channel {{channelName}} by similarity ({{score}}%).
models.tooltipUnavailable: Model comparison could not be completed because no comparable URL bucket was available.

url.tooltipMatched_one: Found {{count}} candidate channel under the same normalized URL bucket. Example candidate: {{channelName}}.
url.tooltipMatched_other: Found {{count}} candidate channels under the same normalized URL bucket. Example candidate: {{channelName}}.
url.tooltipNoMatch: No channel was found under the same normalized URL bucket.

oneTimeKey.subtitle: The full value for key {{name}} is shown only after this creation.
oneTimeKey.subtitleUnnamed: The full key is shown only after this creation.
oneTimeKey.title: Save the full key now
oneTimeKey.warningDescription: AIHubMix does not support viewing the full key again. After closing this dialog, lists or details may only show a masked value.
oneTimeKey.warningTitle: This key can only be viewed once

deleteConfirm.description: These keys will also be deleted from the corresponding sites and cannot be restored through the extension. Confirm their groups are no longer used.

repairMissingKeys.description: Check each account's available groups, create default keys for groups without keys, and list unusual keys whose groups are unavailable.
repairMissingKeys.historyNote: This shows the previous check result. No job is currently running, and you can rerun the check.
repairMissingKeys.initialNotice: After starting, saved accounts will be checked for available groups, and default keys will be created for groups without keys.

invalidKeys.emptyDescription: This check did not find any keys whose groups are unavailable.

previousResult.description: You can view the previous check result. New checks use the current settings.
previousResult.title: Previous check result available

repairMissingKeys.remoteWriteNotice: This action may create new keys on the corresponding sites. It will not automatically delete any keys.

renameOption.helper: Only applies to keys created automatically by the extension. During the check, their names will follow the current group.
renameOption.label: Keep key names aligned with groups
renameOption.tooltip: Only keys with an auto-created naming style are handled, such as “user group (auto)” or “vip group (auto)”. After repair, the name follows the key’s current group. Other names are not changed.

repairMissingKeys.runningNote: This job runs in the background. You can close this dialog and check later, or cancel it from the progress card.
repairMissingKeys.searchPlaceholder: Search account, origin, or site type...

skipReasons.aihubmixOneTimeKey: AIHubMix keys can only be viewed once. Create the key manually and save the full key immediately.
skipReasons.sub2api: Requires selecting a Sub2API group; create the key manually
skipReasons.tokenAutomationUnsupported: This site exposes a service credential instead of API-token management; automatic key repair is skipped.

repairMissingKeys.title: Key coverage check

selectAccountToContinue: Select an account above before viewing or creating keys.

serviceCredential.rotateUnsupported: This site does not support resetting the service key

title: Key Management

unsupportedSource.description: This account's site type can be saved, but the extension has not adapted its key-list protocol yet. Submit a site-support request to help us add key-management support.
unsupportedSource.supportRequestErrorMessage: Key management is not implemented for {{siteType}}
unsupportedSource.title: Key management is not supported for this site type yet
